fields.description: Large text in nav/footer (e.g. CROWN)
fields.name: logoWordmark

fields.description: Small text under wordmark (e.g. NAIL & BEAUTY)
fields.name: logoSubmark

fields.description: Headline text. The 3rd word will render in italic with indent.

fields.description: e.g. "Est. 2024 — Glendene, NZ"
fields.name: aboutEyebrow

fields.description: Slugs of serviceCategory docs to derive "starting from" price
fields.name: categorySlugs

fields.description: When on, the featured image cycles through the gallery automatically. Pauses on hover, when off-screen, and when the visitor has reduced-motion enabled.
fields.name: autoRotate
fields.title: Auto-rotate featured image

fields.description: How often to advance the featured image when auto-rotation is on. Default: 6.
fields.name: rotationSeconds
fields.title: Rotation interval (seconds)

fields.description: e.g. "NZ. All rights reserved."
fields.name: copyrightSuffix

fields.description: Continuous Y-axis spin speed. Default: 0.15
fields.name: idleRotationSpeed
fields.title: Idle Rotation Speed (radians/sec)

fields.description: Amplitude of the gentle side-to-side tilt. Default: 0.02
fields.name: idleWobbleAmount
fields.title: Idle Z Wobble Amount

fields.description: Frequency of the side-to-side tilt. Default: 0.25
fields.name: idleWobbleSpeed
fields.title: Idle Z Wobble Speed

fields.description: Default: 2.5
fields.name: scale
fields.title: Model Scale

fields.description: Hex color like #e8beac. Default: #e8beac
fields.name: color
fields.title: Skin Color (hex)

fields.description: Default: 0.7
fields.name: roughness
fields.title: Material Roughness (0–1)

fields.description: Default: 0.1
fields.name: metalness
fields.title: Material Metalness (0–1)

fields.description: Base color of the manicured nail. Default: #e8c8b8 (warm pink-peach)
fields.name: nailColor
fields.title: Nail Base Color (hex)

fields.description: Color of the French tip at the nail edge. Default: #f5ede4 (soft warm white)
fields.name: nailTipColor
fields.title: Nail French Tip Color (hex)

fields.description: Lower = glossier. Default: 0.1
fields.name: nailRoughness
fields.title: Nail Roughness (0–1)

fields.description: Default: 0.2
fields.name: nailMetalness
fields.title: Nail Metalness (0–1)

fields.description: Optional per-finger override hex.
fields.name: nailThumbColor
fields.title: Nail Override — Thumb

description: A bookable service. Variants (Short / Long etc.) are separate documents.

fields.description: Short blurb shown on the service card in the booking wizard.
fields.name: description

fields.description: How long the appointment takes from start to finish.
fields.name: durationMinutes
fields.title: Duration (minutes)

fields.description: Time blocked AFTER the booking for cleanup. Adds to the slot length.
fields.name: bufferMinutes
fields.title: Buffer / cleanup (minutes)

fields.description: Total service price in dollars. Example: 60 or 60.00.
fields.name: price
fields.title: Full price (NZD)

fields.description: Charged at booking via Stripe. Balance paid in salon. Must be ≤ full price.
fields.name: deposit
fields.title: Deposit (NZD)

fields.description: References the existing serviceCategory.slug for display grouping in the wizard. Optional.
fields.name: linkedCategorySlug
fields.title: Linked menu category slug (optional)

fields.description: Hide from booking without deleting. Existing bookings stay valid.
fields.name: isActive
fields.title: Active (bookable)

name: bookingService
title: Service

description: A bookable technician. Assign which services they perform and their weekly schedule.

fields.description: Shown under the name in the wizard, e.g. "Nail artistry & gel extensions".
fields.name: specialty
fields.title: Specialty (one-line)

fields.description: Which services this technician can perform. Customers will only see this technician for these services.
fields.name: services
fields.title: Services performed

fields.description: One entry per day-of-week (0=Sunday, 6=Saturday). All times in salon timezone.
24h format. Example: 09:00
fields.name: startTime
fields.title: Start time (HH:mm)

fields.description: 24h format. Must be after start time.
fields.name: endTime
fields.title: End time (HH:mm)

fields.description: Optional single break window. Leave blank for no break.
fields.name: breakStart
fields.title: Lunch break start (HH:mm, optional)

fields.name: weeklySchedule
fields.title: Weekly schedule

fields.description: Holidays, sick days, training. Date ranges. For salon-wide closures use Booking Settings → Public Holidays.
Same as start date for a single day.
fields.name: endDate
fields.title: End date

fields.name: timeOff
fields.title: One-off blocked dates

fields.description: Hide from booking without deleting. Existing bookings stay valid.
fields.name: isActive
fields.title: Active (bookable)

name: technician

description: Operational configuration for the booking system. Singleton.

fields.description: Global kill switch. When off, the booking page is disabled.
fields.name: isBookingEnabled
fields.title: Booking enabled

fields.description: IANA timezone identifier. Default: Pacific/Auckland.
fields.name: salonTimezone
fields.title: Salon timezone (IANA)

fields.description: Granularity of bookable start times. Typical: 30.
fields.name: slotIntervalMinutes
fields.title: Slot interval (minutes)

fields.description: Customers must book at least this many hours in advance. Prevents same-hour bookings and gives techs prep time.
fields.name: minHoursAheadToBook
fields.title: Minimum hours ahead to book

fields.description: How far ahead customers can book. Default: 30 days.
fields.name: maxDaysAheadToBook
fields.title: Maximum days ahead to book

fields.description: Customers can self-cancel up to this many hours before the appointment. Inside this window they must phone the salon.
fields.name: cancellationCutoffHours
fields.title: Self-cancel cutoff (hours)

fields.description: How long a slot is held for an unpaid pending booking before expiring. Default: 15.
fields.name: pendingPaymentTtlMinutes
fields.title: Pending payment hold (minutes)

fields.description: Dates when the salon is fully closed. Overrides all technician schedules.
fields.name: publicHolidayDates
fields.title: Public holidays / salon closures

fields.description: Shown on the booking review step and included in confirmation emails.
fields.name: cancellationPolicyText

fields.description: A valid web, email, phone, or relative link.

fields.description: Emails to notify when a new booking is confirmed.

fields.description: Shown on cancellation pages when the customer is inside the cancel cutoff. Falls back to siteSettings.contactPhone.
fields.name: contactPhoneOverride
